scripts.check: bun --filter=uncial run check && bun --filter=uncial-wagtail run check && bun --filter=uncial-cms run check
scripts.test: bun --filter=uncial run test && bun --filter=uncial-wagtail run test && bun --filter=uncial-cms run test
scripts.build: bun --filter=uncial run build && bun --filter=uncial-wagtail run build && bun --filter=uncial-cms run build
scripts.build:wagtail: bun --filter=uncial run build && bun --filter=uncial-wagtail run build
scripts.wagtail:setup: uv sync --project packages/uncial-wagtail && bun --filter=uncial-wagtail run demo:migrate && bun --filter=uncial-wagtail run demo:seed
scripts.wagtail:serve: echo '>> Wagtail demo admin → http://localhost:8000/admin/  (login: admin / admin)' && bun --filter=uncial-wagtail run demo
scripts.dev:wagtail: bun run build:wagtail && bun run wagtail:setup && bun run wagtail:serve
scripts.prepack: bun --filter=uncial run prepack && bun --filter=uncial-cms run prepack
scripts.version: changeset version && bun run scripts/sync-py-versions.ts && uv lock --project packages/uncial-wagtail
